fields.description:
## Context
Two store identifiers are currently fixed: the worktree/symlink dir `.tickets-tracker` (env-overridable via `REBAR_TRACKER_DIR` but NOT via project TOML) and the orphan **branch name** `tickets` (hardcoded in ~20 git invocations, no override at all). Make both overridable through project config, defaulting to the current values so every existing repo is unaffected.

## Proposed design
Add a typed `tracker` config section in `src/rebar/config.py` so the auto-derived env names line up with the established ones:
- `tracker.dir = ".tickets-tracker"`  -> auto-env `REBAR_TRACKER_DIR` (already the canonical override; keep `TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR` as legacy alias).
- `tracker.branch = "tickets"`        -> auto-env `REBAR_TRACKER_BRANCH`.
Register in `_SECTION_CLASSES`, `_SECTIONS` (coercers: dir = relative-safe path; branch = valid git ref via a small validator), and `TrackerConfig` dataclass on `Config`.

Introduce a single resolver `tickets_branch(root=None)` next to `tracker_dir()`, and ROUTE BOTH through the resolved typed Config (full precedence: `-c` flag > env > project > user > default), not env-only. `tracker_dir()` currently consults env only (config.py:81-87) — it must read resolved config like the branch resolver.

## Call sites to migrate off the literals
- Branch `tickets` / `origin/tickets` (replace with `tickets_branch()` + f"origin/{branch}"):
  - `_commands/init.py` (lines ~272-295, 281): orphan/worktree creation, fetch, mount.
  - `_store/sync.py` (read reconverge, ~83-153) and `_store/push.py` (push refspec line 112, merge ~124-165).
  - `_engine/rebar_reconciler/_concurrency.py:56`, `_advisory_lock.py:498,533`.
  - `_engine_support/reads.py:187` (rev-parse verify).
  - `_commands/fsck.py:227-236` (PUSH_PENDING vs origin/<branch>).
- Worktree dir `.tickets-tracker` (replace with `tracker_dir()` / its basename):
  - The DUPLICATE `tracker_dir()` in `_engine_support/reads.py:99-149` must be unified with / kept in sync with `config.tracker_dir()`.
  - `_commands/init.py:152,199,418,461-469`: dir creation, the git `_exclude` it writes, the symlink name, the worktree-path resolver. The exclude must use the resolved basename so a custom dir is auto-gitignored.

## Constraints / decisions
- Defaults unchanged; pure additive. Existing repos and `REBAR_TRACKER_DIR` keep working.
- Project config (committed `[tool.rebar]` in pyproject.toml / rebar.toml) is the right layer for branch name so all clones of one repo agree; the discovery walk stops at `.git` so it resolves at the repo root before the worktree exists.
- OUT OF SCOPE: renaming an EXISTING store (that is a migration). Both values are read at `init` time and thereafter; document that changing them on an initialized repo orphans the old branch/dir and is not auto-migrated. fsck SHOULD warn if a configured branch/dir does not match what is mounted.
- Validate branch against `git check-ref-format`-style rules (reject spaces, `..`, leading `-`, `~^:?*[`, trailing `/` or `.lock`).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tracker.dir` and `tracker.branch` exist as typed config keys with the precedence chain and appear in `rebar config` output + docs/config.md.
- [ ] A single `tracker_dir()` and a new `tickets_branch()` resolver are the only sources of these values; the duplicate resolver is removed/unified.
- [ ] All git invocations listed above use the resolvers (no remaining `"tickets"` / `.tickets-tracker` literals in code paths).
- [ ] `rebar init` honors both on a fresh repo: custom branch + custom dir create + mount + gitignore correctly; round-trips through create/list/show.
- [ ] Defaults reproduce todays behavior byte-for-byte (regression tests green).
- [ ] Branch-name validation rejects invalid refs with a clear ConfigError.
- [ ] Docs updated: README storage section + docs/config.md + docs/architecture.md note configurability.

## Suggested child tasks
1. config: add TrackerConfig section + coercers + branch-ref validator + docs/config.md.
2. resolvers: add tickets_branch(); route tracker_dir() through resolved config; unify the _engine_support duplicate.
3. migrate branch call sites (init/sync/push/reconciler/fsck/reads).
4. migrate worktree-dir call sites (init exclude/symlink/path resolver).
5. init + e2e tests for custom dir & branch; regression test defaults; fsck mismatch warning.
